name: Quick Ping Sweep
description: Fast ICMP ping sweep to discover live hosts. No port scanning.

name: Standard Network Scan
description: Standard scan with common ports and SNMP. Good for regular inventory checks.

name: Deep Security Scan
description: Comprehensive scan with extended port list, SNMP, and SSH fingerprinting. Use for security audits.

name: Network Device Scan
description: Optimized for network devices (firewalls, switches, routers). Includes SNMP and NETCONF ports.

name: Web Server Scan
description: Focused scan for web servers and application endpoints.

name: Database Server Scan
description: Scan for common database ports. Use for database inventory and compliance checks.
